dynamic_content: Location-specific hazard data, IPCC scenario projections, risk scores, building-specific vulnerability analysis, adaptive capacity metrics
format_requirements: PDF Report (primary), Excel worksheets for calculations, GIS maps
human_review: Final verification by resilience consultant, hazard assessment review by licensed professional
notes: Highly automatable with GIS data integration and climate databases. Templates can be standardized with location-specific data feeds.

dynamic_content: Census demographic data, local infrastructure mapping, community-specific social equity scores, housing affordability metrics
format_requirements: PDF Report, Excel demographic data tables, GIS community maps
human_review: Community stakeholder review, demographic data validation by social equity expert
notes: Strong automation potential using census APIs and community databases. Social equity scoring can be algorithmic.

dynamic_content: Energy model outputs, material quantities, grid emission factors, 25-year projection calculations, refrigerant schedules
format_requirements: PDF Report, Excel carbon calculations, USGBC-specific format for submission
human_review: Carbon calculation verification by energy modeler, 25-year projection review
notes: Very high automation - carbon calculations are formulaic and can be directly linked to energy model outputs.

dynamic_content: Project-specific sustainable features, building system specifications, LEED credit strategies pursued, contact information
format_requirements: PDF Document, Word template for customization
human_review: Legal review of tenant guidelines, property management approval
notes: Template-based generation with project-specific customization. Core and Shell specific.

dynamic_content: Team roster, project schedule, owner requirements, interdisciplinary perspectives, measurable goal definitions
format_requirements: PDF Documentation, Excel tracking matrices, Word templates
human_review: Charrette facilitation by integrative process consultant, owner approval of goals
notes: Process documentation with some automation potential. Charrette materials need human facilitation.

dynamic_content: Base building specifications, pursued LEED credits, tenant space requirements, Green Lease Leaders criteria
format_requirements: Word/PDF Lease Template, Excel points worksheet
human_review: Legal review of green lease clauses, tenant representative approval
notes: Legal document templates with automated clause insertion. Green Lease Leaders alignment check is automatable.

dynamic_content: Site boundary coordinates, GIS data layers, floodplain mapping, wetland locations, habitat boundaries
format_requirements: PDF Report with GIS maps, Excel compliance checklist
human_review: Environmental site assessment by qualified professional, GIS data verification
notes: GIS-based automation very high. Site screening can be fully automated with proper data feeds.

dynamic_content: Site address, parcel history, local workforce data, housing market data, brownfield status
format_requirements: PDF Analysis Report, Excel data tables, verification letters
human_review: Brownfield status verification by environmental consultant, historic registry confirmation
notes: Multiple pathway options require decision trees. Brownfield and historic verification can be automated.

dynamic_content: Surrounding parcel data, transit routes and schedules, dwelling unit counts, Walk Score API results
format_requirements: PDF Report, Excel calculations, GIS transit maps
human_review: Density calculations verification, transit data validation
notes: Very high automation potential. Density, transit, and walkability calculations are data-driven.

dynamic_content: Project occupancy, parking ratios, local VMT data, transit accessibility, building type parameters
format_requirements: PDF Assessment, Excel VMT calculations, parking analysis
human_review: Transportation engineer review of VMT calculations, parking analysis verification
notes: VMT and carbon calculations can be automated. Parking and bicycle facility sizing is formulaic.

dynamic_content: Total parking spaces, building type, electrical capacity, accessible parking requirements
format_requirements: PDF Requirements, Excel calculations, electrical specifications
human_review: Electrical engineer review of EVSE specifications, accessibility compliance check
notes: Formula-based calculations for EVSE quantities. Electrical load analysis requires engineering input.

dynamic_content: Site survey data, topography, drainage patterns, vegetation inventory, construction schedule
format_requirements: PDF Plan, CAD drawings, Excel specifications
human_review: Erosion control plan approval by civil engineer, vegetation assessment by ecologist
notes: Erosion control plan templates can be standardized. Vegetation mapping benefits from satellite imagery.

dynamic_content: Site plan measurements, existing vegetation survey, facade drawings, glass specifications, habitat area calculations
format_requirements: PDF Calculations, CAD details, Excel area analysis
human_review: Habitat assessment by ecologist, bird collision analysis by facade consultant
notes: Habitat calculations are area-based and automatable. Bird-friendly glass analysis requires facade modeling.

dynamic_content: Site plan, building footprint, outdoor space design, accessibility route measurements
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, CAD site plans, Excel calculations
human_review: Accessibility consultant review, landscape architect approval
notes: Area calculations are straightforward. Community/cultural elements require design team input.

dynamic_content: Site area, impervious coverage, local rainfall data, soil infiltration rates, LID/GI sizing
format_requirements: PDF Report, Excel stormwater calculations, CAD LID details
human_review: Civil engineer review of stormwater calculations, LID design approval
notes: Stormwater calculations are highly automatable with rainfall data and site parameters.

dynamic_content: IPp1 hazard assessment results, site design parameters, local codes, resilience strategy matching
format_requirements: PDF Strategy Matrix, Excel compliance tracking
human_review: Resilience consultant review, design team coordination
notes: Resilience strategy matching can be automated based on IPp1 results. Design implementation requires coordination.

dynamic_content: Site plan measurements, roof areas, paving areas, material specifications, Tree Equity Score
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, Excel weighted calculations, material specs
human_review: Landscape architect review, material specification verification
notes: SRI calculations and weighted compliance are fully automatable. Tree Equity Score API integration available.

dynamic_content: Luminaire schedules with BUG ratings, lighting zone, signage specifications
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, Excel luminaire schedule, lighting plans
human_review: Lighting designer review of BUG ratings, signage compliance check
notes: BUG rating verification is highly automatable with luminaire schedules. Lighting zone determination is straightforward.

dynamic_content: Building water systems, alternative water sources, facility management structure
format_requirements: PDF Metering Plan, Excel specifications, USGBC commitment forms
human_review: Plumbing engineer approval of metering plan, facility manager sign-off
notes: Metering specifications can be automated. USGBC data commitment requires standardized forms.

dynamic_content: Fixture schedules, appliance specifications, landscape areas, plant types, flow rates
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, Excel water calculations, fixture schedules
human_review: Plumbing engineer review of fixture compliance, irrigation designer approval
notes: Fixture compliance checking is highly automatable. Water calculations follow established methodologies.

dynamic_content: Building water systems, fixture counts, irrigation system, process water systems, meal counts
format_requirements: PDF Submetering Plan, Excel sensor specifications
human_review: Plumbing engineer review of submetering plan, controls specialist approval
notes: Submeter placement can be automated based on system layouts. Leak detection specifications are template-based.

dynamic_content: All water uses, alternative water availability, rainwater, graywater, reclaimed water potential
format_requirements: PDF Water Model, Excel calculations, optimization analysis
human_review: Water engineer review of whole-project model, optimization pathway approval
notes: Whole-project water modeling is complex but automatable with proper algorithms. Optimization pathways can be recommended.

credit_name: Operational Carbon Projection and Decarbonization Plan
dynamic_content: Energy model outputs, grid emission factors, fuel types, electrification options, decarbonization timeline
format_requirements: PDF Carbon Projection, Excel 25-year calculations, USGBC format
human_review: Energy modeler verification of carbon projection, decarbonization plan review
notes: Carbon projection is highly automatable with energy model integration. Decarbonization pathways can be algorithmically compared.

dynamic_content: Building envelope specifications, HVAC systems, lighting design, energy model outputs
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, Excel energy comparisons, model outputs
human_review: Energy modeler/code consultant review of compliance, PE stamp if required
notes: Energy code compliance checking can be automated. ASHRAE 90.1 requirements are well-documented.

dynamic_content: Project schedule, design milestones, system types, owner requirements, CxP designation
format_requirements: PDF Commissioning Plan, Word templates, Excel schedules
human_review: Commissioning authority approval of plan, owner sign-off on OPR
notes: Commissioning plan templates are standardized. Cx milestone tracking can be automated.

dynamic_content: Energy systems, metering points, building type, Arc platform requirements
format_requirements: PDF Metering Plan, Arc platform documentation, Excel reporting schedule
human_review: Electrical engineer review of metering plan, Arc platform setup verification
notes: Metering specifications can be automated. Arc platform integration requires API setup.

dynamic_content: HVAC equipment schedules, refrigerant types, existing system inventory, Montreal Protocol schedules
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, Excel GWP calculations, equipment schedules
human_review: Mechanical engineer review of refrigerant compliance, equipment specification approval
notes: Refrigerant GWP checking is highly automatable with equipment schedules. Montreal Protocol schedules are fixed.

dynamic_content: HVAC equipment schedules, heating loads, climate zone, hot water systems, COP calculations
format_requirements: PDF Calculations, Excel COP analysis, equipment specs
human_review: Mechanical engineer verification of COP calculations, electrification pathway approval
notes: COP calculations are formulaic and automatable. Electrification pathway analysis can be algorithmic.

dynamic_content: Building envelope specifications, ventilation design, energy model, thermal bridge details
format_requirements: PDF Analysis, Excel peak load calculations, ERV specs
human_review: Energy modeler review of peak load reductions, envelope consultant approval
notes: Peak load modeling requires energy simulation. Envelope and ERV analysis can be automated.

dynamic_content: Energy model, baseline model, building specifications, climate zone, percent improvement
format_requirements: PDF Energy Analysis, Excel percent improvement, model comparison
human_review: Energy modeler verification of percent improvement, PE stamp if required
notes: Energy model comparison to baseline is automatable. Percent improvement calculations are straightforward.

dynamic_content: Building energy use, roof area, solar resource data, REC procurement plans, renewable potential
format_requirements: PDF Renewable Analysis, Excel production calculations, REC documentation
human_review: Electrical engineer review of renewable analysis, solar consultant approval
notes: Renewable energy production estimation can be automated with PVWatts integration. REC verification requires registry access.

dynamic_content: BMS data streams, energy consumption, system performance parameters, MBCx analytics
format_requirements: PDF MBCx Plan, Excel analytics specifications, dashboard requirements
human_review: Commissioning authority review of MBCx plan, controls specialist approval
notes: MBCx analytics can be automated with BMS data integration. Fault detection algorithms are available.

dynamic_content: Building loads, DR-capable equipment, storage specifications, utility DR programs
format_requirements: PDF Grid Integration Specs, Excel DR analysis, utility documentation
human_review: Electrical engineer review of DR capability, utility coordination approval
notes: DR capability assessment can be automated. Storage sizing requires load analysis.

dynamic_content: HVAC equipment schedules, refrigerant charges, system types, GWP values
format_requirements: PDF GWP Analysis, Excel calculations, equipment alternatives
human_review: Mechanical engineer verification of GWP calculations, equipment selection approval
notes: GWP impact calculation is highly automatable. Low-GWP equipment recommendations can be database-driven.

dynamic_content: Building type, occupancy, local recycling services, floor plans, waste stream projections
format_requirements: PDF Zero Waste Plan, Excel storage sizing, service documentation
human_review: Waste consultant review of zero waste plan, facility manager approval
notes: Waste stream projections can be automated based on building type and occupancy. Zero waste plan templates are standardized.

document_types: Bill of Materials with GWP Values
dynamic_content: Structural drawings, material specifications, quantities take-off, EPD data, GWP values
format_requirements: PDF Embodied Carbon Report, Excel BOM with GWP, USGBC format
human_review: LCA practitioner review of embodied carbon calculations, material specialist approval
notes: Bill of materials extraction can be automated with BIM integration. Embodied carbon calculations use standardized databases.

dynamic_content: Existing building survey, demolition plans, salvage material inventory, market values
format_requirements: PDF Reuse Calculations, Excel area analysis, salvage documentation
human_review: Structural engineer review of building reuse, salvage material valuation approval
notes: Building reuse calculations require existing building surveys. Salvage material tracking can be automated.

dynamic_content: Material quantities, EPDs, baseline project data, construction fuel/energy use, WBLCA results
format_requirements: PDF WBLCA Report, Excel reduction calculations, EPD summaries
human_review: LCA practitioner review of WBLCA, embodied carbon specialist verification
notes: WBLCA analysis can be automated with tools like Tally or One Click LCA. EPD analysis requires database access.

dynamic_content: Product specifications, manufacturer certifications, product submittals, emission standards
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Matrix, Excel product tracking, certifications
human_review: Indoor air quality consultant review of product compliance, specifier approval
notes: Product specification verification can be automated with manufacturer certification databases.

dynamic_content: Product specifications, manufacturer documentation, certification claims, EPD/HPD inventory
format_requirements: PDF Product Documentation, Excel EPD/HPD inventory, certification summary
human_review: Sustainability consultant review of product documentation, manufacturer verification
notes: EPD/HPD tracking can be automated with registry integration. Certification validation requires database access.

dynamic_content: Waste manifests, hauler reports, material weights, diversion calculations
format_requirements: PDF Waste Tracking Report, Excel diversion calculations, manifests
human_review: Waste consultant review of diversion calculations, hauler documentation verification
notes: Waste tracking and diversion calculations can be automated with hauler data integration.

dynamic_content: Construction schedule, site conditions, weather data, material delivery schedule
format_requirements: PDF IAQ Plan, Word templates, Excel monitoring schedule
human_review: Construction manager approval of IAQ plan, safety officer review of heat prevention
notes: IAQ plan templates are standardized. Heat illness prevention requires OSHA compliance.

dynamic_content: Space types, occupancy, outdoor air quality data, HVAC design, ventilation rates
format_requirements: PDF Compliance Report, Excel ventilation calculations, air quality data
human_review: Mechanical engineer review of ventilation calculations, IAQ consultant approval
notes: Ventilation calculations follow ASHRAE 62.1 and can be automated. Filtration verification is straightforward.

dynamic_content: Building entries, air intake locations, operable windows, site plan, 25-foot zones
format_requirements: PDF Policy Document, CAD signage plans, Excel zone mapping
human_review: Property manager approval of no-smoking policy, signage placement verification
notes: No-smoking zone mapping can be automated from architectural drawings. Policy templates are standardized.

dynamic_content: Baseline ventilation rates, HVAC design, IAQ design targets, enhanced limits
format_requirements: PDF Calculations, Excel ventilation analysis, compliance verification
human_review: Mechanical engineer review of enhanced ventilation, IAQ consultant verification
notes: Enhanced ventilation calculations are automatable. IAQ design verification requires enhanced limit compliance.

dynamic_content: Building geometry, glazing specifications, interior layouts, site surroundings, acoustic zones
format_requirements: PDF Analysis Reports (daylight, acoustic, thermal), Excel simulations
human_review: Daylighting consultant review, acoustic engineer approval, thermal comfort verification
notes: Daylight simulation requires specialized software. Acoustic and thermal analysis can be automated.

dynamic_content: Floor plans, design specifications, accessibility goals, inclusive design features
format_requirements: PDF Accessibility Checklist, Excel feature matrix, gap analysis
human_review: Accessibility consultant review, inclusive design expert approval
notes: Accessibility checklist generation can be automated. Inclusive design features require design team input.

dynamic_content: HVAC design, building envelope, operable window specifications, IPp1 priority hazards
format_requirements: PDF Resilience Verification, Excel window coverage, thermal zones
human_review: Resilience consultant review, mechanical engineer approval of thermal safety
notes: Resilient space verification can be automated based on IPp1. Operable window analysis is straightforward.

dynamic_content: Building area, space types, testing requirements, monitoring system options, sensor locations
format_requirements: PDF Testing Protocol, Excel sensor specifications, results framework
human_review: IAQ testing consultant approval of protocol, monitoring system specialist review
notes: Testing protocol generation can be automated. Monitoring system specification requires sensor selection.

dynamic_content: Project location, pursued credits, project type, innovation ideas, regional priorities
format_requirements: PDF Recommendations, Excel credit tracking, innovation framework
human_review: LEED consultant review of regional priorities, innovation strategy approval
notes: Regional priority identification can be automated with USGBC database access. Innovation strategies require creativity.

dynamic_content: Team roster, credential information, GBCI credential verification
format_requirements: PDF Verification, credential documentation
human_review: GBCI credential verification, project administrator approval
notes: LEED AP verification can be automated with GBCI credential directory access.
